narrative:
Clermont Northeastern Local Sd (Clermont) school district has 8,830 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
